title: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Is Up 8.53% in One Week: What You Should Know
text: Does Super Micro Computer (SMCI) have what it takes to be a top stock pick for momentum investors? Let's find out.

title: Why Fast-paced Mover Super Micro (SMCI) Is a Great Choice for Value Investors
text: Super Micro (SMCI) could be a great choice for investors looking to buy stocks that have gained strong momentum recently but are still trading at reasonable prices. It is one of the several stocks that made it through our 'Fast-Paced Momentum at a Bargain' screen.

title: Computer Stock Hits Profit-Taking Target As It Extends Torrid Rally
text: Super Micro Computer is extended above a buy point in a cup base. The stock is on watch after strong earnings and profits as it doubles manufacturing to meet demand.

title: Surging Earnings Estimates Signal Upside for Super Micro (SMCI) Stock
text: Super Micro (SMCI) shares have started gaining and might continue moving higher in the near term, as indicated by solid earnings estimate revisions.

title: 4 Stocks Trading Near 52-Week High That Can Climb Further
text: Investors target stocks that have been on a bullish run lately. Stocks like SMCI, DINO, NINE and THR, which are seeing price strength, have a high chance of carrying the momentum forward.

title: Nothing Micro About Super Micro Computer's Price & Earnings Gains
text: Small-cap Super Micro Computer is holding its gains after gapping up on a better-than-expected earnings report and increased full-year guidance.

title: Supermicro Unveils a Broad Portfolio of Performance Optimized and Energy Efficient (Air and Liquid Cooled) Systems Incorporating 4th Gen Intel® Xeon® Scalable Processors
text: Supermicro's Expansive X13 Portfolio Includes the SuperBlade ® , Hyper, BigTwin ® , GrandTwin™, SuperEdge, FatTwin ® , GPU Servers Supporting SXM, OAM and PCIe, CloudDC, WIO, and Petascale Storage Systems SAN JOSE, Calif. and DALLAS , Nov. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Supercomputing Conference 2022 (SC22) -- Supermicro, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI), a Total IT Solution Provider for Cloud, AI/ML, Storage, and 5G/Edge, at the 2022 Super Computing Conference is unveiling the most extensive portfolio of servers and storage systems in the industry based on the upcoming 4th Gen Intel Xeon Scalable processor, formerly codenamed Sapphire Rapids.

title: Supermicro Expands Data Center Optimized Total IT Solutions with 4th Gen AMD EPYC™ Processors, Delivering World Record Performance for Today's Most Critical Workloads
text: All New Single and Dual Socket Servers for Cloud, AI/ML, HPC, HCI, and Enterprise Applications – Contain Up to 192 Cores, up to 12TB DDR5-4800MHz 12-channel Memory, and up to 160 PCIe 5.0 Lanes to Drive the Most Advanced Applications SAN JOSE, Calif. , Nov. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Supermicro (NASDAQ: SMCI), a Total IT Solution Provider for Cloud, AI/ML, Storage, and 5G/Edge, is announcing significant additions to its already broad product line with servers supporting the new 4th Gen AMD EPYC processors.

title: 7 Strong Tech Stocks to Buy Now for the Upcoming Bull Market
text: Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL ) became the latest member of the FAANG-plus-Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) group to deliver bad news on Nov. 6. Specifically, AAPL reported that shipments of its iPhone 14 Pro and iPhone 14 Pro Max would be below its previous outlook.

title: Looking for a Fast-paced Momentum Stock at a Bargain? Consider Super Micro (SMCI)
text: If you are looking for stocks that have gained strong momentum recently but are still trading at reasonable prices, Super Micro (SMCI) could be a great choice. It is one of the several stocks that passed through our 'Fast-Paced Momentum at a Bargain' screen.

title: Supermicro Opens Remote Online Access Program, JumpStart for the H13 Portfolio of Systems Based on the All-New 4th Gen AMD EPYC™ Processors
text: The Free Online Access Program Enables Remote Workload Testing, Benchmarking, and Validation of Supermicro's New AMD EPYC Processor-Powered Systems That Will Begin Shipping November 10th SAN JOSE, Calif. , Nov. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Supermicro (NASDAQ: SMCI) , a Total IT Solution Provider for Cloud, AI/ML, Storage, and 5G/Edge, announces its JumpStart remote access program – Supermicro H13 JumpStart -- for workload testing and application tuning on 4th Gen AMD EPYC processor-based systems.

title: These two ‘under the radar' stocks are great for this environment
text: U.S. stocks sure look less attractive today after the central bank ruled out the possibility of “pausing” just yet. (link) But there are two “under the radar” stocks that remain worth owning in this environment, says Josh Wein.

title: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript

title: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Super Micro (SMCI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 9.27% and 2.90%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Supermicro Announces First Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Financial Results
Take Your Profits Or Hold On To Super Micro Computer?
text: I am a profit-first quantitative analyst. SMCI has a +26.88% 1-month price return. The best move now is to cash out the paper gains. On the other hand, you can hold on for greater gains if you think SMCI's upside momentum will get stronger until November.
